member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.ComosObjectController.GetPlantObjects(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Fulltext search with specified pattern
member.param: Last change date for objects to return. Older objects are not contained.
fileds to reduce the retrieved properties to

members.member:
Get complete object properties of passed comos object .
database id project id comos object id fileds to reduce the retrieved properties to overlay id language id object properties GET /api/comos_gateway/v1/dbs/{dbid}/projects/{projid}/objects/{objid}

Get complete object properties of passed comos object .
database id project id comos object path full name fileds to reduce the retrieved properties to overlay id language id object properties GET /api/comos_gateway/v1/dbs/{dbid}/projects/{projid}/object

member.summary: Get complete object properties and specifications of passed comos objects.
member.param: comos objects uids as a filter
fileds to reduce the retrieved properties to

members.member:
Get specific object properties by list of syncmappingitems
database id contains a list of syncmappingitems project id overlay id language id list of syncmappingitems GET /api/webview/v1/dbs/{dbid}/objects

members.member:
Get specific object properties by list of syncmappingitems
database id contains a list of syncmappingitems project id overlay id language id list of syncmappingitems GET /api/webview/v1/dbs/{dbid}/projects/objects

nested names of specifications to be included in response

member.name: T:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController
member.summary: Documents controller
Ctor

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocument(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Gets a document by downloading it. The supplied document ID can refer to documents of various types:
a plain COMOS document (including reports)
a DDM (= versioned) document (in this case the latest version will be retrieved)
a particular version of a DDM (= versioned) document
a revision (in this case the parameter "docid" technically refers to COMOS device)
a redlining document of a revision
an additional document of a revision
In addition, the user can specify an export type for reports (see the paramter description below).
Concerning the download of redlinings up to version COMOS 10.1 the document ID must be refer to a revision and additionally the parameter user_id must be provided. From COMOS version 10.2 upwards the document ID can directly refer to the redlining document.
member.param: Export type. At the moment the types 'report2pdf' and 'report2excel' are supported. Note that docid must refer to a report in this case.
optional start object for the query
member.returns: The document contents as a download.

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentVersion(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.returns: The document contents as a download.

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentsInObject(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get all documents below an object

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.AddDocumentToObject(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: This method posts/stores a new attachment of a task. From the body part of the POST message the name and content of the file are retrieved. The size of the file is fetched from a header.

member.summary: This method posts/stores a new attachment of a task. From the body part of the POST message the name and content of the file are retrieved. The size of the file is fetched from a header.

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.PostDocumentCheckout(System.String,System.String,System.String,Comos.Gateway.Contracts.KeyValue,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Checks out a document.
Note that this operation does not do a download - it must be done by calling the route "... {projid}/documents/{docid}".

member.summary: Creates placeholder under given object

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetPlantRevisionIdForEsign(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: to get plant revision id for project revision

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.PostDocumentUndoCheckout(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Undoes a document checkout.

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.PostDocumentCheckin(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Checks in a document through an upload.
A message body with the content type "multipart/form-data" is expected. A name/value pair with the key "comment" must be provided as well as a name/value pair with the key "values" containing the a list of specification items (technically of type SpecificationValue). The message body must also contain a file e.g. in the following format: ' ... Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="Test.txt" Content-Type: text/plain"
This is the contents of the file ! '.

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.PostTransmittals(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Upload the documents in Bulk using zip file

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentMetadataSearchSettings(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the free properties configured for document metadata search, under project settings.

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentMetadataSearchResult(System.String,System.String,Comos.Gateway.Contracts.SearchManagerFilter,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the documents, with given search criteria

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.ReplaceDocument(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces the document of a given object while keeping the UID

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.DocumentsController.FilterPDFAndFDFBlobs(System.Net.Http.MultipartFormDataStreamProvider,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Net.Http.MultipartFileData}@)
member.summary: Extracts additional files (PDF or FDF blobs) from the provided MultipartFormDataStreamProvider and updates the fileData list with the remaining files.
member.param: The MultipartFormDataStreamProvider containing the uploaded files.
A reference to the list of MultipartFileData to be updated with non-PDF/FDF files.
member.returns: An array of FileMetaData objects representing the additional files (PDF or FDF blobs).

member.summary: This method fetches all EXCEL configs from the well-known location 'G001|Y00R00072|A10' in the 'Documents' section of a project in COMOS.

If required view is Tree View.
member.returns: Excel configs with the attributes 'Name', 'Description', and 'UID'.

member.name: M:Comos.Gateway.Services.Controllers.ProjectsController.GetChangesForNavigatorNode(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: This method fetches for a given node object in the navigator all COMOS objects that have changes according to the working layer view in COMOS. Technically speaking, all devices that satisfy the condition "device.GetSystemStatus(Plt.ComosSystemConstants.System_Status_Overlay) > 0" are recursively collected.
